description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Wednesday, May 22, 2024 at approximately 3:45pm PST, a Nuro Prius operating in manual mode bumped a pedestrian at the
intersection of Webster Street and Middlefield Road in Palo Alto, California.
The Nuro Prius was in autonomous mode when it approached the intersection and came to a stop at the stop bar on Webster Street. It is
a two-way stop with the traffic on Middlefield having right of way. The Nuro Prius nudged forward due to an occlusion.The Nuro operator 
judged the nudging to be too far and disengaged autonomous mode to reverse in manual. When reversing, the operator bumped a pedestrian 
crossing the street behind the Nuro Prius. 
The pedestrian was not injured and after speaking with the operator, left the scene without providing additional information. There was no 
damage to the vehicle and law enforcement was not involved.
Print
Clear Form
